specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition throughout every season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners actually need — honest work, done right, with the kind of attention your boat deserves.

At Ben's Boatworks, our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull work without hauling out, a refrigerant recharge on your cabin air conditioning, or a full sanitation system overhaul, we have the skills and equipment to get it done properly. We take these systems seriously because a failure in any one of them can turn a great day on the water into a real problem.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, covering a wide service area within 60 miles of Annapolis, MD. Our clients range from weekend cruisers to liveaboards who depend on their vessels day in and day out. We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way — with care, precision, and straight talk about what needs to be done and why. When you work with Ben's Boatworks, you're working with people who genuinely care about getting you back on the water.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey provides a detailed assessment of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition — essential for pre-purchase decisions, insurance requirements, or peace of mind before a long passage. Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough inspections covering the hull, deck, electrical systems, and onboard equipment to give you a clear, accurate picture of what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, zinc replacement, propeller checks, and fouling removal without the time and cost of hauling a vessel out of the water. Ben's Boatworks performs professional dive work to keep running gear clean and protected, catching problems below the waterline before they become serious repairs.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, seawater cooling circuits, and onboard electrical integration that differs significantly from residential HVAC work. Ben's Boatworks services, repairs, and installs marine AC units to keep cabins comfortable and systems running efficiently across the full boating season.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems — including holding tanks, through-hulls, Y-valves, and macerator pumps — must meet both functional and regulatory standards to keep vessels compliant and odor-free. Ben's Boatworks handles installation, repair, and overhaul of onboard sanitation systems to ensure everything works reliably and up to code.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haulout
Marine AC system repair, recharge, and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank and sanitation system overhaul for liveaboards
Through-hull and seacock inspection, replacement, and resealing
Propeller and running gear inspection via professional dive service
Insurance or documentation marine survey for existing vessel owners
